title: electrified
description:
electronic items in minecraft!
will get implemented into foodion soon!
body:
CREDITS: MCreator for being an awesome mod developement program, 
Pylo (youtube) for creating such understandable tutorials

electrified! this mod adds electric blocks to minecraft!
play around with the new solar panels and generate FE! you can even use that electricity to store in a battery or to use it on a electrical machine!
what we add includes: ores, FE, machines and more!

1.0.0 additions: 
electric fan, 
solar panel, 
battery                                                                            
fabric version WIP!
